name: 渣男白眼狼（前未婚夫）
description: 被女主幫助上位後忘恩負義，背地裡嫌棄女主身份低微，與小三暗通款曲。核心功能是成為女主復仇的對象，讓觀眾渴望看到他被打臉。

examples.drama_title: On her first day, the cleaning girl defied the CEO, expecting to be fired—but he proposed to her!
examples.excerpt: I can't stand people like her. too broke to act fancy but still try so hard. / Because she saved my grandma. My grandma made me get engaged to her. But now my grandma is gone. I can finally kick her out of my life.
examples.context: 被女主幫助上位後忘恩負義，背地裡嫌棄女主身份低微，與小三暗通款曲。核心功能是成為女主復仇的對象，讓觀眾渴望看到他被打臉。
